# Get packages

## OpenAPI Specification

````yaml
openapi: 3.0.1
info:
  title: ""
  description: ""
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /v2/packages:
    get:
      summary: Get packages
      deprecated: false
      description: >-
        :::highlight blue 💡

        This endpoint comes with a Rate Limit:  **80 requests per minute to
        fetch packages** per unique authentication token.

        :::


        Retrieve a list of local and global eSIM packages available through the
        Airalo Partners API. Local packages cover a single country, while global
        packages span multiple countries and regions. This endpoint helps you
        synchronize eSIM plans/packages with your system, ensuring newly
        introduced packages are available to your clients and out-of-stock
        packages are handled properly.

        ## Features

        - **Package Types**: Supports standard data packages and the new "Voice
        and Text" packages.

        - **Filtering**: Filter results by operator type or country code to
        tailor the package list to your needs.

        - **Pagination**: Adjust pagination settings to retrieve results in
        manageable chunks.

        - **Limit**: Set the `limit` parameter to a high value (e.g., 1,000) to
        fetch all packages in a single request without using pagination.

        - **Include Top-Up**: Use the `include=topup` query parameter to fetch eSIM
        packages along with their associated top-up packages.


        ## Multi-Currency

        This endpoint provides pricing information in multiple currencies for
        both net prices and recommended retail prices. All currency conversion
        rates are updated once daily at 00:00 UTC.


        ## Step-by-step implementation:

        To keep your catalog up to date, including stock availability, new
        packages, and pricing, while avoiding performance or rate-limit issues,
        it’s important to run an hourly backend sync.

        Below, we provide a step-by-step guide to help you successfully sync
        your packages:


        ### Hourly Sync

        - Set up a background job via cron, worker, or cloud scheduler that
        calls GET /v2/packages **once every hour**.

        - Include the required authentication header: `Authorization: Bearer
        <ACCESS_TOKEN>`  ([Refer to Request access
        token](https://developers.partners.airalo.com/request-access-token-11883021e0))


        ### Single Full Fetch (No Limit Param)

        - Call the endpoint without a limit parameter to retrieve the full
        catalogue (~3,200 packages) in a single response. This eliminates
        pagination and keeps the sync logic straightforward.

        - Alternatively, you can implement pagination or split sync runs (e.g.
        alternating between eSIMs and top-ups).


        ### Rate-Limit Context

        - The browse packages endpoint allows up to 80 requests per minute per
        unique authentication token. One sync per hour is far below the
        threshold and safe to run continuously.


        ### Snapshot-Based Processing

        - Store the returned JSON as a complete snapshot (file, object storage,
        or database).

        - Upsert packages using `package_id` as the unique key.

        - Remove any packages missing from the latest snapshot.

        - Sync operators, coverage, pricing, and metadata fields.


        ## Throtlling policy

        Identify unlimited packages with usage restrictions by checking the
        `is_fair_usage_policy` boolean. If enabled, the `fair_usage_policy`
        field contains a string describing the specific limitations.

        Example:

        ```

        "is_fair_usage_policy": true,

        "fair_usage_policy": "Lower speed rate of 1 Mbps after 3 GB usage per
        day."

        ```
      tags:
        - REST API/Endpoints/Browse packages
      parameters:
        - name: filter[type]
          in: query
          description: >-
            Optional. A string to filter packages by operator type. Possible
            values are "local" and "global".

            If the filter is set to "global," the output will include only
            global and regional eSims. Global and regional packages do not use
            the "country_code" field, which will be empty. The "type" field in
            the operator object within the response will be set to "global." A
            package is considered worldwide if its "slug" field is set to
            "world" and regional if "slug" contains a region name, for example,
            "europe" or "Africa".

            If the filter is set to "local," the response will contain only
            country-specific packages. To get the list of packages for a single
            country, you can use it in combination with filter[country]
            parameter. The "type" field in the operator object of the response
            will indicate a "local" type.

            When the filter is not set, we return all types of eSIMs: local,
            regional, and global.
          required: false
          example: global
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: filter[country]
          in: query
          description: >-
            Optional. A string to filter packages by country code. Examples
            include US, DE, GB, IT, and UA.
          required: false
          example: TR
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: limit
          in: query
          description: >-
            Optional. An integer specifying how many items will be returned on
            each page.
          required: false
          example: ""
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: page
          in: query
          description: >-
            Optional. An integer specifying the pagination's current page.

            If the page is set to 2 or beyond, the response will have different
            format and contain an object representing the country's index in the
            list of packages.
          required: false
          example: "1"
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: include
          in: query
          description: >-
            Optional. Valid value is topup. Includes topup packages to the
            response
          required: false
          example: topup
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: Accept
          in: header
          description: ""
          required: true
          example: application/json
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: ""
          required: true
          example: Bearer {{token}}
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: url
          in: header
          description: ""
          example: https://partners-api.airalo.com
          schema:
            type: string
            default: https://partners-api.airalo.com
      responses:
        "200":
          description: ""

                              install_window_days:

                                  The # of days from when an eSIM is bought from

                                nullable: true
                              topup_grace_window_days:
                                type: integer
                                description: >-
                                  The # of days from when an eSIM is exhausted
                                  or expired until a topup is bought. If this

                                  is recycled and can no longer be topped up.
                                  Note that after each topup this period
                                  restarts.
                                nullable: true

              examples:
                "1":
                  summary: List Packages (200)
                  value:
                    pricing:
                      model: net_pricing
                      discount_percentage: 0
                    data:
                      - slug: united-states
                        country_code: US
                        title: United States
                        image:
                          width: 132
                          height: 100
                          url: >-
                            https://cdn-revamp.airalo.com/images/ad19c2a2-40b8-4dac-b95e-269703c8561b.png
                        operators:
                          - id: 1181
                            style: light
                            gradient_start: "#0f1b3f"
                            gradient_end: "#194281"
                            type: local
                            is_prepaid: false
                            title: Change
                            esim_type: Prepaid
                            warning: null
                            apn_type: manual
                            apn_value: wbdata
                            is_roaming: true
                            info:
                              - 5G Data-only eSIM.
                              - Rechargeable online with no expiry.
                              - >-
                                Operates on T-Mobile, Verizon, and U.S. Cellular
                                networks in the United States of America.
                            image:
                              width: 1035
                              height: 653
                              url: >-
                                https://cdn-revamp.airalo.com/images/6bf8859b-3f43-41c7-ac54-434e2534813c.png
                            plan_type: data
                            activation_policy: first-usage
                            is_kyc_verify: false
                            rechargeability: true
                            other_info: >-
                              This eSIM is for travelers to the United States.
                              The coverage includes the United States and Puerto
                              Rico, with limited availability in Alaska.
                            coverages:
                              - name: US
                                code: US
                                networks:

                                    types:

                                  - name: Verizon
                                    types:

                            install_window_days: 365
                            topup_grace_window_days: 180
                            apn:

                                apn_value: wbdata
                              android:
                                apn_type: manual
                                apn_value: wbdata
                            packages:
                              - id: change-in-3days-unlimited
                                type: sim
                                price: 11.5
                                amount: 0
                                day: 3
                                is_unlimited: true
                                title: Unlimited - 3 days
                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                is_fair_usage_policy: 1
                                fair_usage_policy: >-
                                  Lower speed rate of 1 Mbps after 3 GB usage
                                  per day.

                                qr_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_EUconnect</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan the QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:\_</b>Enable data roaming.</p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_EUconnect</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:\_</b>Enable data roaming.</p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                            install_window_days: 365

                                apn_value: null
                            packages:
                              - id: eu-connect-in-3days-unlimited
                                type: sim
                                price: 10
                                amount: 0
                                day: 3
                                is_unlimited: true
                                title: Unlimited - 3 days
                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_EUconnect</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan the QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:\_</b>Enable data roaming.</p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_EUconnect</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:\_</b>Enable data roaming.</p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                is_fair_usage_policy: 1
                                fair_usage_policy: >-
                                  Lower speed rate of 1 Mbps after 3 GB usage
                                  per day.

                                text: null

                                title: Unlimited - 30 days
                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_EUconnect</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan the QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:\_</b>Enable data roaming.</p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_EUconnect</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, Sweden, and the United Kingdom.</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:\_</b>Enable data roaming.</p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Élan</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>France</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Turn on the eSIM line.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Élan</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>France</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Turn on the eSIM line</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                title: Unlimited - 15 days
                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Chinacom</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>China</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\".</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Chinacom</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>China</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\".</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                price: 4

                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Chinacom</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>China</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\".</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Chinacom</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>China</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\".</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Guay Mobile</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Spain</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Mamma Mia</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Italy</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Mamma Mia</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Italy</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Mamma Mia</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Italy</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                              (CEIR) and pay a one-time tax. You currently can’t
                              purchase eSIMs in Turkey. For seamless
                              connectivity, please purchase and install your
                              eSIM before you travel.

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"

                          - id: 1012

                            title: Merhaba
                            esim_type: Prepaid

                            apn_type: manual

                            info:
                              - 5G Data-only eSIM.
                              - Rechargeable online with no expiry.
                              - >-
                                Operates on the Turk Telekom/AVEA network in

                              - This eSIM does not cover Northern Cyprus.
                            image:
                              width: 1035
                              height: 653
                              url: >-

                            plan_type: data
                            activation_policy: first-usage
                            is_kyc_verify: false
                            rechargeability: false
                            other_info: >-
                              This eSIM does not cover Northern Cyprus. If you
                              plan to use your eSIM data for 91 days
                              (accumulated) or more in a 120-day period, you
                              must register your device’s IMEI number on
                              Turkey’s Central Equipment Identification Register
                              (CEIR) and pay a one-time tax. You currently can’t
                              purchase eSIMs in Turkey. For seamless
                              connectivity, please purchase and install your
                              eSIM before you travel.

                                    types:

                                apn_value: globaldata

                                apn_type: manual
                                apn_value: globaldata

                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Mamma Mia</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Italy</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Mamma Mia</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Italy</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Mamma Mia</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Italy</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                            style: light
                            gradient_start: "#b91f35"
                            gradient_end: "#ad1e35"
                            type: local
                            is_prepaid: false
                            title: Merhaba
                            esim_type: Prepaid
                            warning: null
                            apn_type: manual
                            apn_value: globaldata
                            is_roaming: true
                            info:
                              - 5G Data-only eSIM.
                              - Rechargeable online with no expiry.
                              - >-
                                Operates on the Turk Telekom/AVEA network in
                                Turkey.
                              - This eSIM does not cover Northern Cyprus.
                            image:
                              width: 1035
                              height: 653
                              url: >-
                                https://cdn-revamp.airalo.com/images/b547f1c0-bb69-423a-b846-61cc0170699a.png
                            plan_type: data
                            activation_policy: first-usage
                            is_kyc_verify: false
                            rechargeability: true
                            other_info: >-
                              This eSIM does not cover Northern Cyprus. If you
                              plan to use your eSIM data for 91 days
                              (accumulated) or more in a 120-day period, you
                              must register your device’s IMEI number on
                              Turkey’s Central Equipment Identification Register
                              (CEIR) and pay a one-time tax. You currently can’t
                              purchase eSIMs in Turkey. For seamless
                              connectivity, please purchase and install your
                              eSIM before you travel.
                            coverages:
                              - name: TR
                                code: TR
                                networks:
                                  - name: Turk Telekom (Avea)
                                    types:

                            install_window_days: 365
                            topup_grace_window_days: 90
                            apn:

                                apn_type: automatic
                                apn_value: globaldata

                                apn_type: manual
                                apn_value: globaldata

                                short_info: This eSIM doesn't come with a phone number.
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"

                                short_info: This eSIM doesn't come with a phone number.
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"

                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p>"

                            plan_type: data

                            is_kyc_verify: false
                            rechargeability: false
                            other_info: >-
                              This eSIM does not cover Northern Cyprus. If you
                              plan to use your eSIM data for 91 days
                              (accumulated) or more in a 120-day period, you
                              must register your device’s IMEI number on
                              Turkey’s Central Equipment Identification Register
                              (CEIR) and pay a one-time tax. You currently can’t
                              purchase eSIMs in Turkey. For seamless
                              connectivity, please purchase and install your
                              eSIM before you travel.

                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Merhaba</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>Turkey</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on another device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Locate the APN settings in your settings menu.</li><li>Update the APN to \"globaldata\"</li><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                            style: light
                            gradient_start: "#0f1b3f"

                            type: local
                            is_prepaid: false
                            title: Change
                            esim_type: Prepaid
                            warning: null

                                price: 11.5

                                day: 3
                                is_unlimited: true
                                title: Unlimited - 3 days
                                short_info: null
                                qr_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                manual_installation: "<p><br></p><p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><br></p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><br></p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><p><br></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><br></p><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p><br></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                qr_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Change</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>United States</p><p><b>To activate the eSIM by scanning the QR code on your eSIM capable device you need to print or display this QR code on other device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Scan QR code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Enable data roaming.</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"

                                manual_installation: "<p><b>eSIM name:</b>\_Élan</p><p><b>Coverage:\_</b>France</p><p><b>To manually activate the eSIM on your eSIM capable device:</b></p><ol><li>Settings > Cellular/Mobile > Add Cellular/Mobile Plan.</li><li>Manually enter the SM-DP+ Address and activation code.</li><li>Confirm eSIM plan details.</li><li>Label the eSIM.</li></ol><p><b>To access Data:</b></p><ol><li>Turn on the eSIM line</li></ol><p><b>To top up:</b></p><p>Visit airalo.com/my-esims or if purchased through the Airalo website/app visit “My eSIMs” tab.</p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p>"
                                is_fair_usage_policy: false
                                fair_usage_policy: null
                                data: 20 GB
                                voice: null
                                text: null
                                prices:
                                  recommended_retail_price:
                                    AUD: 33.37
                                    BRL: 119.85
                                    GBP: 17.62
                                    CAD: 32.66
                                    AED: 86.24
                                    EUR: 20.21
                                    INR: 2168.58
                                    IDR: 399946
                                    ILS: 72.62
                                    JPY: 3729
                                    KWD: 7.285

                                    MXN: 410.08
                                    SGD: 29.84
                                    ZAR: 386.1
                                    KRW: 34751
                                    USD: 23.5
                                    VND: 618846

                                  url: >-

                                nullable: true

        x-200:List Local Packages (200):
          description: ""
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  pricing:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      model:
                        type: string
                      discount_percentage:
                        type: integer
                    required:
                      - model
                      - discount_percentage
                    x-apidog-orders:
                      - model
                      - discount_percentage
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        slug:
                          type: string
                        country_code:
                          type: string
                        title:
                          type: string
                        image:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            width:
                              type: integer
                            height:
                              type: integer
                            url:
                              type: string
                          required:
                            - width
                            - height
                            - url
                          x-apidog-orders:
                            - width
                            - height
                            - url
                        operators:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              id:
                                type: integer
                              style:
                                type: string
                              gradient_start:
                                type: string
                              gradient_end:
                                type: string
                              type:
                                type: string
                              is_prepaid:
                                type: boolean
                              title:
                                type: string
                              esim_type:
                                type: string
                              warning:
                                type: "null"
                              apn_type:
                                type: string
                              apn_value:
                                type: string
                                nullable: true
                              is_roaming:
                                type: boolean
                              info:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                              image:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  width:
                                    type: integer
                                  height:
                                    type: integer
                                  url:
                                    type: string
                                required:
                                  - width
                                  - height
                                  - url
                                x-apidog-orders:
                                  - width
                                  - height
                                  - url
                              plan_type:
                                type: string
                              activation_policy:
                                type: string
                              is_kyc_verify:
                                type: boolean
                              rechargeability:
                                type: boolean
                              other_info:
                                type: string
                                nullable: true
                              coverages:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                    code:
                                      type: string
                                    networks:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: object
                                        properties:
                                          name:
                                            type: string
                                          types:
                                            type: array
                                            items:
                                              type: string
                                        required:
                                          - name
                                          - types
                                        x-apidog-orders:
                                          - name
                                          - types
                                  required:
                                    - name
                                    - code
                                    - networks
                                  x-apidog-orders:
                                    - name
                                    - code
                                    - networks
                              install_window_days:
                                type: integer
                                description: >-
                                  The # of days from when an eSIM is bought from
                                  operator until it can be installed on a
                                  device. If this time passes - the sim is
                                  recycled and gone (cannot be used/ topped up)
                                nullable: true
                              topup_grace_window_days:
                                type: integer
                                description: >-
                                  The # of days from when an eSIM is exhausted
                                  or expired until a topup is bought. If this
                                  period passes and no topup is bought, the sim
                                  is recycled and can no longer be topped up.
                                  Note that after each topup this period
                                  restarts.
                                nullable: true
                              apn:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  ios:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      apn_type:
                                        type: string
                                      apn_value:
                                        type: string
                                        nullable: true
                                    required:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                    x-apidog-orders:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                  android:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      apn_type:
                                        type: string
                                      apn_value:
                                        type: string
                                        nullable: true
                                    required:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                    x-apidog-orders:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                required:
                                  - ios
                                  - android
                                x-apidog-orders:
                                  - ios
                                  - android
                              packages:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    id:
                                      type: string
                                    type:
                                      type: string
                                    price:
                                      type: number
                                    amount:
                                      type: integer
                                    day:
                                      type: integer
                                    is_unlimited:
                                      type: boolean
                                    title:
                                      type: string
                                    short_info:
                                      type: string
                                      nullable: true
                                    qr_installation:
                                      type: string
                                    manual_installation:
                                      type: string
                                    is_fair_usage_policy:
                                      type: boolean
                                    fair_usage_policy:
                                      type: "null"
                                    data:
                                      type: string
                                    voice:
                                      type: integer
                                      nullable: true
                                    text:
                                      type: integer
                                      nullable: true
                                    net_price:
                                      type: number
                                    prices:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        net_price:
                                          type: object
                                          properties:
                                            AUD:
                                              type: number
                                            BRL:
                                              type: number
                                            GBP:
                                              type: number

                                              type: number

                                              type: number

                                              type: integer

                                              type: number

                                              type: integer

                                              type: number

                                              type: number

                                              type: number
                                            KRW:
                                              type: integer
                                            USD:
                                              type: number
                                            VND:
                                              type: integer
                                            ZAR:
                                              type: number
                                          required:
                                            - AUD
                                            - BRL

                                            - CAD
                                            - AED
                                            - EUR

                                            - ILS
                                            - JPY
                                            - MYR
                                            - MXN
                                            - SGD
                                            - KRW
                                            - USD
                                            - VND

        x-200:List Packages with Pagination (200):
          description: ""
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  pricing:
                    type: object
                    properties:
                      model:
                        type: string
                      discount_percentage:
                        type: integer
                    required:
                      - model
                      - discount_percentage
                    x-apidog-orders:
                      - model
                      - discount_percentage
                  data:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: object
                      properties:
                        slug:
                          type: string
                        country_code:
                          type: string
                        title:
                          type: string
                        image:
                          type: object
                          properties:
                            width:
                              type: integer
                            height:
                              type: integer
                            url:
                              type: string
                          required:
                            - width
                            - height
                            - url
                          x-apidog-orders:
                            - width
                            - height
                            - url
                        operators:
                          type: array
                          items:
                            type: object
                            properties:
                              id:
                                type: integer
                              style:
                                type: string
                              gradient_start:
                                type: string
                              gradient_end:
                                type: string
                              type:
                                type: string
                              is_prepaid:
                                type: boolean
                              title:
                                type: string
                              esim_type:
                                type: string
                              warning:
                                type: "null"
                              apn_type:
                                type: string
                              apn_value:
                                type: string
                              is_roaming:
                                type: boolean
                              info:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: string
                              image:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  width:
                                    type: integer
                                  height:
                                    type: integer
                                  url:
                                    type: string
                                required:
                                  - width
                                  - height
                                  - url
                                x-apidog-orders:
                                  - width
                                  - height
                                  - url
                              plan_type:
                                type: string
                              activation_policy:
                                type: string
                              is_kyc_verify:
                                type: boolean
                              rechargeability:
                                type: boolean
                              other_info:
                                type: string
                                nullable: true
                              coverages:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    name:
                                      type: string
                                    code:
                                      type: string
                                    networks:
                                      type: array
                                      items:
                                        type: object
                                        properties:
                                          name:
                                            type: string
                                          types:
                                            type: array
                                            items:
                                              type: string
                                        required:
                                          - name
                                          - types
                                        x-apidog-orders:
                                          - name
                                          - types
                                  required:
                                    - name
                                    - code
                                    - networks
                                  x-apidog-orders:
                                    - name
                                    - code
                                    - networks
                              install_window_days:
                                type: "null"
                                description: >-
                                  The # of days from when an eSIM is bought from
                                  operator until it can be installed on a
                                  device. If this time passes - the sim is
                                  recycled and gone (cannot be used/ topped up)
                              topup_grace_window_days:
                                type: "null"
                                description: >-
                                  The # of days from when an eSIM is exhausted
                                  or expired until a topup is bought. If this
                                  period passes and no topup is bought, the sim
                                  is recycled and can no longer be topped up.
                                  Note that after each topup this period
                                  restarts.
                              apn:
                                type: object
                                properties:
                                  ios:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      apn_type:
                                        type: string
                                      apn_value:
                                        type: string
                                    required:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                    x-apidog-orders:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                  android:
                                    type: object
                                    properties:
                                      apn_type:
                                        type: string
                                      apn_value:
                                        type: string
                                    required:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                    x-apidog-orders:
                                      - apn_type
                                      - apn_value
                                required:
                                  - ios
                                  - android
                                x-apidog-orders:
                                  - ios
                                  - android
                              packages:
                                type: array
                                items:
                                  type: object
                                  properties:
                                    id:
                                      type: string
                                    type:
                                      type: string
                                    price:
                                      type: number
                                    amount:
                                      type: integer
                                    day:
                                      type: integer
                                    is_unlimited:
                                      type: boolean
                                    title:
                                      type: string
                                    short_info:
                                      type: string
                                      nullable: true
                                    qr_installation:
                                      type: string
                                    manual_installation:
                                      type: string
                                    is_fair_usage_policy:
                                      type: boolean
                                    fair_usage_policy:
                                      type: "null"
                                    data:
                                      type: string
                                    voice:
                                      type: "null"
                                    text:
                                      type: "null"
                                    net_price:
                                      type: number
                                    prices:
                                      type: object
                                      properties:
                                        net_price:
                                          type: object
                                          properties:
                                            AUD:
                                              type: number

                                              type: number
                                            GBP:
                                              type: number

                                              type: number

                                              type: integer

                                              type: number

                                              type: integer

                                              type: number

                                              type: number
                                            SGD:
                                              type: number
                                            KRW:
                                              type: integer
                                            USD:
                                              type: number
                                            VND:
                                              type: integer
                                            ZAR:
                                              type: number
                                          required:
                                            - AUD
                                            - BRL
                                            - GBP
                                            - CAD
                                            - AED
                                            - EUR
                                            - INR
                                            - IDR
                                            - ILS
                                            - JPY
                                            - MYR
                                            - MXN
                                            - SGD
                                            - KRW
                                            - USD
                                            - VND
                                            - ZAR
                                          x-apidog-orders:
                                            - AUD

                                            - GBP

                                            - EUR
````
